title: Customer and Service Support Team Leader

summary.lv: Epson Europe BV (Seiko Epson Corporation Eiropas filiāle) meklē Customer and Service Support Team Leader Rīgas birojam, kas vadīs klientu un servisa atbalsta komandu hibrīda režīmā.
summary.en: Epson Europe BV — the European arm of Seiko Epson Corporation — is hiring a Customer and Service Support Team Leader for its Riga office to lead the customer and service-support team in a hybrid setup.
